body:
## Rationale

Jaska Raatikainen (/drummer/55) appears in **today's GA4 top organic pages** (2 views). Children of Bodom is one of the most influential Finnish melodic death metal bands, with a large and passionate fanbase especially in Europe and Japan.

Jaska has **zero articles** in the `albumArticles.js` corpus. GA4 organic signal confirms active search discovery — no editorial content exists to convert that intent.

**Target queries:** "jaska raatikainen drum setup", "children of bodom drummer gear", "jaska raatikainen kit", "alexi laiho band drummer"

## Article spec

**Slug:** `jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup`  
**Route:** `/articles/jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup`  
**Title:** "Jaska Raatikainen Drum Setup — Children of Bodom Gear Guide"  
**relatedDrummerSlug:** `jaska-raatikainen`

**Content (≥300 words):**
- Intro: "Jaska Raatikainen is the drummer for Children of Bodom, using a Pearl Masters kit with Zildjian cymbals throughout the band's career..."
- Quick Facts: kit brand, cymbal brand, sticks
- Gear breakdown: drums, cymbals, hardware, sticks
- Melodic death metal technique section (blast beats + melodic fills hybrid)
- Gear evolution: Follow the Reaper era through I Worship Chaos
- FAQ (≥3):
  - "What drum kit does Jaska Raatikainen use?"
  - "What cymbals does Children of Bodom's drummer play?"
  - "How did Jaska Raatikainen's setup evolve over Children of Bodom's career?"
- Internal links: /drummer/jaska-raatikainen, related drummer profiles, lick pages

## File to touch
`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add new entry

## Quality gate
- [ ] ≥300 words of substantive gear content
- [ ] ≥3 FAQ Q&As with data-backed answers
- [ ] ≥3 internal links
- [ ] Article + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList schema in SSR
- [ ] /articles/jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup returns 200

## Done
- [ ] New entry `jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup` in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`
title: SEO: Jaska Raatikainen drum setup article — GA4 organic today, Children of Bodom, no article
